text:
EyeTube (アイチューベ, AiChūbe) is a video-sharing website where people can share and upload videos in the world of Hunter × Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 340 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

The website was first revealed when a viral video of Beyond Netero announcing his expedition to the Dark Continent and his request for everyone to join him was uploaded. The video received over 100 million views within an hour. 

Trivia

EyeTube's real-life counterpart is YouTube.

Translations around the World

References

fr:I-Tube
